content: Common PII leak vectors in DOM-capture/session-replay style instrumentation: hidden DOM elements and dynamic components can still contain sensitive values; validation/error messages that echo user input back into the DOM leak PII if captured; full DOM paths/selectors can themselves be identifying (e.g. paths through user-specific content). Best practice is capture-time sanitization/allow-listing (mask/exclude by default, explicitly allow low-risk fields) rather than post-hoc scrubbing.
